scripts.validate:title: bun scripts/validate-title.ts
scripts.lint: NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 bunx biome check AGENTS.md ARCHITECTURE.md README.md biome.json bunfig.toml package.json tsconfig.json .diligent .github apps/overdare-agent packages scripts docs/guide docs/plan docs/review thirdparty/examples thirdparty/terminal-bench
scripts.lint:fix: NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 bunx biome check --write AGENTS.md ARCHITECTURE.md README.md biome.json bunfig.toml package.json tsconfig.json .diligent .github apps/overdare-agent packages scripts docs/guide docs/plan docs/review thirdparty/examples thirdparty/terminal-bench
scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-x64 && bun run build:windows-x64
scripts.typecheck: NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./packages/protocol/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p packages/protocol/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./packages/plugin-sdk/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p packages/plugin-sdk/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./packages/core/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./packages/cli/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./packages/web/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p packages/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck:thirdparty: NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-analytics/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-analytics/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-rag/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-rag/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-studiorpc/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-studiorpc/tsconfig.json && NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 ./apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-validator/node_modules/.bin/tsc --pretty false --noEmit -p apps/overdare-agent/plugins/plugin-validator/tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test
